seo.title: Lacey Stielow, MSN, RN - Director of Nursing | Des Moines Wellness Center | Alcohol & Drug Rehab Iowa
seo.description: Meet Lacey Stielow, MSN, RN, Director of Nursing at Des Moines Wellness Center, specializing in compassionate patient care and addiction recovery support.

image.alt: Lacey Stielow, MSN, RN - Director of Nursing
Lacey Stielow, MSN, RN - Director of Nursing

sections.heading: Ready to Take the First Step?
body: Recovery is built on relationships. If you’re looking for help with addiction or mental health challenges, our team is here to guide you every step of the way. Contact Des Moines Wellness Center to learn more about our programs and admissions process.

sections.heading: Recovery Starts With the Right People
body: At Des Moines Wellness Center, our team is committed to providing compassionate, evidence-based care for addiction and co-occurring mental health conditions. Whether you’re looking for medical detox, residential treatment, PHP, IOP, or ongoing recovery support, we’re here to help you find the right path forward. Contact our admissions team today to learn more about treatment options, verify insurance, and take the first step toward lasting recovery.

images.alt: Lacey Stielow, MSN, RN - Director of Nursing
